text.title: Google Shopping Ads Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is feed_health_pct ≥80 AND Merchant Center linked AND ≥30 conv/mo per tier?

conclusion.verdict: ship high / medium / clearance priority tiers
ship high / low tier split (defer 3-tier until taxonomy ready)

text.example: feed=92%, MC linked, 65 conv/mo, taxonomy ready → 3-tier split shipped.
